issue:
Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. 
Can you let me know how to do this?
subject: How to Remove a User
response: To remove an interviewer from the platform, you need to go to Teams Management (click your profile icon > Teams Management), then navigate to the Users tab. Select the user you want to remove, click the "More" button (three dots), and choose "Lock" to lock their access. Note that if you want to completely remove them, you would need to remove them from all teams they belong to, as removing a user from their only team will automatically lock their account.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: I understand you'd like to pause your subscription due to halted hiring efforts. However, the pause subscription feature is only available for individual self-serve monthly plans (Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly) that have been active for at least 30 days. This feature is not available for team or enterprise subscriptions. If you have a team subscription, you may want to consider downgrading or canceling instead. Could you please confirm what type of subscription plan you currently have so I can provide more specific guidance?

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: Yes, you can update the name on your certificate. You can do this only once per account, and the change will apply to all your certificates. To update it: open your certificate page, enter the correct name in the Full Name field, click Regenerate Certificate, and confirm by clicking Update Name.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response:
To dispute a charge, follow these steps:

1. **Contact your card issuer**: Reach out to the bank that issued your Visa card to question the charge on your billing statement.

2. **Provide transaction details**: Your card issuer will work with the merchant's bank to request an accurate copy of the transaction record.

3. **Review the response**: The merchant will be asked to provide documentation, and your issuer will review the information to resolve the dispute.

For assistance with lost or stolen cards or other support needs, you can also contact Visa's customer support line for your country.

issue: I have found a major security vulnerability in Claude, what are the next steps
subject: Bug bounty
response: Thank you for reporting a security vulnerability in Claude. Please review our Responsible Disclosure Policy at https://www.anthropic.com/responsible-disclosure-policy, which includes detailed instructions on how to submit your report. For technical security vulnerabilities in our systems (such as misconfigurations, privilege escalation, SQL injection, etc.), please follow the submission process outlined in that policy. The security of our systems and user data is our top priority, and we appreciate security researchers acting in good faith to help keep Anthropic safe.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response:
To stop Claude from crawling your website, add the following to your robots.txt file in your top-level directory:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

You'll need to do this for every subdomain you want to opt out. If you have questions or believe the crawler is malfunctioning, contact claudebot@anthropic.com from an email that includes your domain name.

issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
subject: Employee leaving the company
response: To remove an employee who has left from your HackerRank hiring account, you should lock their user access. Go to Teams Management > Users tab, select the employee, click More > Lock, and confirm. You'll need to transfer their resource ownership to another user during this process. The account will remain available for reuse but the user won't be able to log in.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response:
To set up Claude LTI for your students in Canvas, you'll need to follow these steps as an administrator:

1. Create a Claude LTI Developer Key in Canvas (Admin -> Developer Keys), configuring the redirect URIs, target link URI, and OpenID Connect initiation URL with the Claude endpoints
2. Install Claude LTI as an App in Canvas using the generated Client ID
3. Enable the Canvas integration in your Claude for Education organization settings (Organization settings > Connectors), entering your Canvas Domain, Client ID, and Deployment ID

For detailed step-by-step instructions including all required URLs and configuration settings, please refer to the complete setup guide. If you have questions about your Claude for Education account, contact your university's administrator.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: Visa does not set minimum purchase amounts for card transactions. According to Visa's card acceptance guidelines, merchants are not permitted to require minimum purchase amounts when you use your Visa card. If a merchant in the US Virgin Islands is requiring a $10 minimum spend, this violates Visa's rules. You can report this issue using Visa's online form for in-store purchase problems, or contact Visa support at 1 800 847 2911 (the number for US Virgin Islands is not specifically listed, but nearby territories use this number).
